description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet constructed from light-colored wood with a natural grain pattern. The front features two vertically stacked drawers on the right side, each with a minimalist recessed handle, and a larger open compartment on the left, likely for legroom or storage. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing office items or equipment. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel featuring a small circular cutout, possibly for cable management. The cabinet's design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a sturdy build. It is well-suited for use in offices, home workspaces, or administrative areas in urban environments.
description: A light wood filing cabinet with two drawers and an open compartment, featuring recessed handles and a flat top. Its modern, minimalist design is practical for office or home use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with recessed handles and an open compartment on the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wooden panel and a small circular cutout near the bottom left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible features.
